comment: Project-scoped MCP. The postgres-ro server runs in RESTRICTED (read-only) mode and connects with the dedicated read-only role. On first use Claude Code asks you to approve this server (project .mcp.json is never auto-trusted). Enable via /mcp -> approve 'postgres-ro', or set permissions.enableAllProjectMcpServers in .claude/settings.json (we leave it false on purpose). If your machine cannot run the server non-interactively, fall back to: `make introspect` (scripts/introspect_schema.py) which dumps the same schema to data/semantic/raw_schema.json.
